texto: Rose was the one who knew the path, but these were the things Rose knew, and I wondered if maybe it was this knowing the back of things, the shortcuts, the forgotten stories, that gives you the right to call a place home.
explicacao: Citação de Catherine Landis sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “Rose was the one who knew the path, but these were the things Rose knew, and I wondered if maybe …” articula reflexao, home, things em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
